name: Solvac S.A.
summary: Solvac S.A., through its participation interest in Solvay SA, operates as an advanced materials and specialty chemicals company in Belgium. The company offers advanced material, such as specialty polymers, composite materials, chemicals, and silica; advanced formulations; and performance chemicals, including soda ash and derivatives, peroxides, and glycerine-based sustainable solvents solutions. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.
